channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Monday, July 13 (game #1631)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Monday, July 13 (game #1128)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Monday, July 13 (game #862)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quote of the day by Sun Microsystems CEO Scott McNealy: 'You have zero privacy anyway. Get over it' — an early declaration foreshadowing the modern era
item.description: Although the erosion of privacy feels more of a modern phenomenon, the earliest digital systems were a subtle sign of things to come

item.title: How to watch Love Island USA S8 final online from anywhere
item.description: Here's how to watch the Love Island USA S8 final online, the clear favourites being Bryce Dettloff & Trinity Tatum, aka Brinity.
